name: Internet Explorer Browsing Configuration & History
categoryDescription: User behavior artifacts — browsing history, recently accessed files, search terms, and folder navigation.
description: Internet Explorer and Windows Internet Settings — typed URL history, search scopes, zone trust mapping, proxy settings, and privacy configuration. Internet Settings affects all WinInet-based applications.
forensic_value: TypedURLs reveals every URL manually typed — high-value for timeline. ZoneMap shows sites added to Trusted zone — attackers add malicious sites to bypass security warnings.
parsers: RegRipper (internet_explorer_cu.pl, typedurls_tln.pl, typedurlstime_tln.pl, searchscopes.pl, domains.pl, proxysettings.pl, internet_settings_cu.pl)
